items.final_wording: Specifies fatigue description, onset, course, duration, functional effect, sleep, mood, associated symptoms, medication, family, and social history.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Fatigue – 06
source.population: People presenting with fatigue; no precise age range is stated in the applicability section.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth fatigue documentation; partial for a setting-agnostic GP workflow.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines fatigue domains, duration categories, and broad medical, psychological, medication, and substance-related associations.
